channel.title: 194th Annual General Conference

itunes:owner.itunes:name: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints

channel.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints

item.title: Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers
item.description:
Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers by Presented by President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
undefined
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Presented by President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: Church Auditing Department Report, 2023
item.description:
Church Auditing Department Report, 2023 by Presented by Jared B. Larson, Managing Director, Church Auditing Department given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
To the First Presidency of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Presented by Jared B. Larson, Managing Director, Church Auditing Department

item.title: Motions of a Hidden Fire
item.description:
Motions of a Hidden Fire by President Jeffrey R. Holland, Acting President of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
God hears every prayer we offer and responds to each of them according to the path He has outlined for our perfection.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Jeffrey R. Holland, Acting President of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Put Ye On the Lord Jesus Christ
item.description:
Put Ye On the Lord Jesus Christ by Sister J. Anette Dennis, First Counselor in the Relief Society General Presidency given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
Through honoring our covenants, we enable God to pour out the multitude of promised blessings associated with those covenants.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Sister J. Anette Dennis, First Counselor in the Relief Society General Presidency

item.title: Pillars and Rays
item.description:
Pillars and Rays by Elder Alexander Dushku, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
We too can have our own pillar of light—one ray at a time.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Alexander Dushku, Of the Seventy

item.title: Covenant Confidence through Jesus Christ
item.description:
Covenant Confidence through Jesus Christ by Elder Ulisses Soares, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
When we enter the Lord’s house, we embark on a sacred journey of learning to become higher and holier disciples of Christ.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ulisses Soares, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Integrity: A Christlike Attribute
item.description:
Integrity: A Christlike Attribute by Elder Jack N. Gerard, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
Living a life of integrity requires us to be true to God, to each other, and to our divine identity.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Jack N. Gerard, Of the Seventy

item.title: All Will Be Well Because of Temple Covenants
item.description:
All Will Be Well Because of Temple Covenants by President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
There is nothing more important than honoring the covenants you have made or may make in the temple.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: “Be Still, and Know That I Am God”
item.description:
“Be Still, and Know That I Am God” by Elder David A. Bednar, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
We can be still and know that God is our Heavenly Father, we are His children, and Jesus Christ is our Savior.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder David A. Bednar, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Rise! He Calleth Thee
item.description:
Rise! He Calleth Thee by Elder Massimo De Feo, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
The gospel is not a way to avoid challenges and problems but a solution to increase our faith and learn how to deal with them.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Massimo De Feo, Of the Seventy

item.title: A Record of What I Have Both Seen and Heard
item.description:
A Record of What I Have Both Seen and Heard by Elder Brent H. Nielson, Of the Presidency of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
There has never been a better time to be a member of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Brent H. Nielson, Of the Presidency of the Seventy

item.title: Jesus Christ at the Center of Our Lives
item.description:
Jesus Christ at the Center of Our Lives by Elder Jose L. Alonso, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
The profound questions of the soul, those that surface in our darkest hours and highest trials, are addressed through the unwavering love of Jesus Christ.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Jose L. Alonso, Of the Seventy

item.title: All Things for Our Good
item.description:
All Things for Our Good by Elder Gerrit W. Gong, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
In time and eternity, the purpose of Creation and the nature of God Himself are to bring all things together for our good.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Gerrit W. Gong, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: In Support of the Rising Generation
item.description:
In Support of the Rising Generation by Brother Michael T. Nelson, Second Counselor in the Young Men General Presidency given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
It is relationships in the lives of the youth that have the greatest influence on their choices.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Brother Michael T. Nelson, Second Counselor in the Young Men General Presidency

item.title: Be One with Christ
item.description:
Be One with Christ by Elder Quentin L. Cook, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
We are united by our love of and faith in Jesus Christ and His Atonement. The essence of truly belonging is to be one with Christ.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Quentin L. Cook, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Miracles, Angels, and Priesthood Power
item.description:
Miracles, Angels, and Priesthood Power by Elder Shayne M. Bowen, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Evening session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
If you desire the blessings of the priesthood, including miracles and the ministry of angels, walk the path of covenants God has made available.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Shayne M. Bowen, Of the Seventy

item.title: Foreordained to Serve
item.description:
Foreordained to Serve by Elder Steven R. Bangerter, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Evening session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
Our Heavenly Father desires to reveal to you your personal foreordination, and He will do so as you seek to learn and follow His will.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Steven R. Bangerter, Of the Seventy

item.title: Faithful to the End
item.description:
Faithful to the End by Sister Andrea Muñoz Spannaus, Second Counselor in the Young Women General Presidency given in the Saturday Evening session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
By His hand, you will be able to bring down every Goliath that appears in your life.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Sister Andrea Muñoz Spannaus, Second Counselor in the Young Women General Presidency

item.title: Fruit That Remains
item.description:
Fruit That Remains by Elder Matthew L. Carpenter, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Evening session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
Having the Holy Ghost seal our ordinances is essential if we want to have the promised blessings for all eternity.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Matthew L. Carpenter, Of the Seventy

item.title: A Higher Joy
item.description:
A Higher Joy by Elder Dieter F. Uchtdorf, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Evening session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
May we all seek and find the higher joy that comes from devoting our lives to our Heavenly Father and His Beloved Son.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Dieter F. Uchtdorf, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Words Matter
item.description:
Words Matter by Elder Ronald A. Rasband, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
Words set a tone. They voice our thoughts, feelings, and experiences, for good or bad.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ronald A. Rasband, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Pray, He Is There
item.description:
Pray, He Is There by President Susan H. Porter, Primary General President given in the Sunday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
I invite you to pray to know Heavenly Father is there, pray to grow to become like Him, and pray to show His love to others.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Susan H. Porter, Primary General President

item.title: The Powerful, Virtuous Cycle of the Doctrine of Christ
item.description:
The Powerful, Virtuous Cycle of the Doctrine of Christ by Elder Dale G. Renlund, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
I invite you to live the doctrine of Christ repeatedly, iteratively, and intentionally and help others on their way.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Dale G. Renlund, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Trust in the Lord
item.description:
Trust in the Lord by Elder Paul B. Pieper, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
Our relationship with God will grow only to the degree we are willing to place our trust in Him.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Paul B. Pieper, Of the Seventy

item.title: God’s Intent Is to Bring You Home
item.description:
God’s Intent Is to Bring You Home by Elder Patrick Kearon, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
Everything about the Father’s plan for His beloved children is designed to bring everyone home.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Patrick Kearon, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Swallowed Up in the Joy of Christ
item.description:
Swallowed Up in the Joy of Christ by Elder Brian K. Taylor, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
I testify that our Heavenly Father hears your tearful pleadings and will always respond in perfect wisdom.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Brian K. Taylor, Of the Seventy

item.title: Covenants and Responsibilities
item.description:
Covenants and Responsibilities by President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Sunday Morning session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
The Church of Jesus Christ is known as a church that emphasizes making covenants with God.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: The Testimony of Jesus
item.description:
The Testimony of Jesus by Elder D. Todd Christofferson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
My invitation is to act now to secure your place as one who is valiant in the testimony of Jesus.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder D. Todd Christofferson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Call, Don’t Fall
item.description:
Call, Don’t Fall by Elder Taylor G. Godoy, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
If we call out to God, I testify we will not fall.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Taylor G. Godoy, Of the Seventy

item.title: Bridging the Two Great Commandments
item.description:
Bridging the Two Great Commandments by Elder Gary E. Stevenson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
Our ability to follow Jesus Christ depends upon our strength and power to live the first and second commandments with balance and equal devotion.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Gary E. Stevenson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Opposition in All Things
item.description:
Opposition in All Things by Elder Mathias Held, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
To be able to exercise our agency, we need to have opposing options to consider.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Mathias Held, Of the Seventy

item.title: Temples, Houses of the Lord Dotting the Earth
item.description:
Temples, Houses of the Lord Dotting the Earth by Elder Neil L. Andersen, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
As you come worthily and prayerfully to His holy house, you will be armed with His power.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Neil L. Andersen, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: It Is Wisdom in the Lord That We Should Have the Book of Mormon
item.description:
It Is Wisdom in the Lord That We Should Have the Book of Mormon by President Mark L. Pace, Sunday School General President given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
It is my prayer that reading the Book of Mormon this year will be a joy and a blessing for each of us.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Mark L. Pace, Sunday School General President

item.title: Rejoice in the Gift of Priesthood Keys
item.description:
Rejoice in the Gift of Priesthood Keys by President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 194th Annual General Conference on Sun Mar 31 2024
Priesthood keys govern how the priesthood of God may be used to bring about the Lord’s purposes and bless all who accept the restored gospel.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
